title: N2 temporarily closed following truck fire
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has issued a notice of a temporary road closure, following a truck fire taking place on the N2 in the direction of George, just before the Hartenbos off-ramp.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has issued a notice of a temporary road closure, following a truck fire taking place on the N2 in the direction of George, just before the Hartenbos off-ramp."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The notice was issued at 05:55 this morning, 16 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All emergency crews are on the scene and traffic is being diverted.","html":"All emergency crews are on the scene and traffic is being diverted."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Advertiser has sent an enquiry to police. An update will be provided once more information becomes available.","html":"Mossel Bay Advertiser has sent an enquiry to police. An update will be provided once more information becomes available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: N2 temporarily closed following truck fire
